why_it_matters: HBTA is the acidic beta-diketone extractant; without pure-component and association parameters, a predictive ePC-SAFT organic phase cannot be claimed.
near_term_action: Search ePC-SAFT/PC-SAFT literature and local package tables; if absent, define a documented beta-diketone surrogate or fit pseudo-parameters.

why_it_matters: TOPO is the neutral synergist coordinating lithium; it affects organic-phase nonideality and complex stabilization.
near_term_action: Search package tables and literature; consider TOP/TBP only as documented surrogate if chemically justified.

why_it_matters: The diluent controls organic phase properties, phase split, and ion transfer; sulfonated kerosene is not a single pure component.
near_term_action: Choose a defensible pseudo-component, kerosene surrogate, n-dodecane, n-cetane, hexane, or fitted mixture surrogate with a limitation note.

why_it_matters: Lithium transfer into the organic phase likely depends on a Li-BTA-TOPO complex or equivalent association representation.
near_term_action: Define the minimum complex species or association-site representation after reaction network selection.

why_it_matters: Ca and Mg are handled by pretreatment before the Li/Na extraction showcase.
near_term_action: Keep pretreatment explicit; do not add Mg/Ca extraction-equilibrium work unless a future branch targets residual divalent competition.

why_it_matters: Saponification/deprotonation controls the active ligand form and sodium exchange.
